items.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq futures slip as fallout from Trump's tariff reversal unsettles market
items.description: Wall Street has been buffeted by the winds of Trump's tariffs over the weekend. A SCOTUS ruling was quickly refuted by the president in a fast-developing situation.

items.title: U.S. launches Peace Corps-backed ‘Tech Corps’ to help export AI, counter China
items.description: As part of efforts to spread its global AI footprint and counter China, Washington has announced a new "tech corps."

items.title: Nvidia, Warner Bros., Berkshire Hathaway, Home Depot, and More Stocks to Watch This Week
items.description: FEATURE  The and indexes both snapped multi-week losing streaks last week, rising 1.5% and 1.1%, respectively. The big news was Friday’s Supreme Court ruling striking down some of President Donald Trump’s tariffs.
